files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Adding fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader.__init__, get_source, list_templates, and updating class docstring in src/jinja2/loaders.py

fields.note: Adding fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader.__init__, get_source, list_templates, and updating class docstring in src/jinja2/loaders.py

content:
type: DEFER
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
spec: Add fallback_searchpath support to FileSystemLoader only (do not touch other classes for this spec). 1) In FileSystemLoader.__init__, add new optional parameter fallback_searchpath: t.Optional[t.Union[str, os.PathLike, t.Sequence[t.Union[str, os.PathLike]]]] = None, placed after existing params (searchpath, encoding, followlinks) - keep it last so it doesn't break positional-arg callers. Normalize it the same way searchpath is normalized (wrap single str/PathLike in a list, os.fspath() each element). If None, store self.fallback_searchpath = [] (empty list), else store the normalized list. 2) In FileSystemLoader.get_source, first search self.searchpath as today; if not found, then search self.fallback_searchpath directories in order using the exact same file-resolution logic (open_if_exists, decode, mtime, uptodate closure). Only raise TemplateNotFound if not found in either. Primary searchpath entries must always be checked before any fallback_searchpath entry. 3) In FileSystemLoader.list_templates, walk both self.searchpath and self.fallback_searchpath (primary first, then fallback), merge into the same 'found' set so duplicates across primary/fallback (or within either) are deduped, and return sorted(found) as before - no separate ordering/priority needed here since it's just a name listing. 4) Update the class docstring :param list to document fallback_searchpath, e.g. ':param fallback_searchpath: A path, or list of paths, to search if a template is not found in searchpath. Falls back only when not found in the primary paths.' Backward compatible: omitting the parameter must behave exactly as before.
note: This is my whole feature (Add search path fallback mechanism). Please implement alongside your path_transform changes in the same file.

Falls back only when not found in the primary paths.' Backward compatible: omitting the parameter must behave exactly as before.
